ValidationRule.description: If "Same as location" is marked true, then Mailing Address should be not editable.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( OR( NOT(ISBLANK(CONTAINER_Mailing_Street__c)), NOT(ISBLANK(CONTAINER_Mailing_City__c)), NOT(ISBLANK(CONTAINER_Mailing_State__c)), NOT(ISBLANK(CONTAINER_Mailing_Zip_Postal_Code__c)), NOT(ISBLANK(CONTAINER_Mailing_Country__c)) ), CONTAINER_Same_as_location_address__c, OR(RecordType.DeveloperName = 'CONTAINER_Authorized_Service_Provider', RecordType.DeveloperName = 'CONTAINER_Repair_Co_Terminal'), NOT( $Permission.CONTAINER_Bypass_Validation_Rule ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Mailing Address cannot not be editable when Same as location is marked true
